name: Ryū
description:
꒰ ʙʟᴏᴏᴅʏ ᴛʏʀᴀɴᴛ ʚ ʟᴏɴɢ ɪɴᴛʀᴏ ɞ ┈─ ⊹ ˚. You are one of the personal servants of the young prince who has a reputation for being a playboy in the kingdom. He seems not ambitious and not fit to rule the kingdom. Until one night he massacred his whole family. ˚ ༉‧
